title: PM Skills Marketplace
description: The AI operating system for product managers. 80+ PM skills and 19 chained workflow commands across 9 plugins — covering discovery, strategy, execution, go-to-market, market research, analytics, and more.

plugins.name: PM Operating System
plugins.description: Navigation, daily rituals, and cross-plugin chained workflows. Start here when you are not sure which skill to use or want to run a multi-step workflow end-to-end.

plugins.name: PM Execution
plugins.description: Day-to-day product management: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, retros, release notes, pre-mortems, stakeholder management, user stories, async updates, and working backwards documents.

plugins.name: PM Product Discovery
plugins.description: Ideation, experiments, assumption testing, opportunity solution trees, and customer interviews.

plugins.name: PM Product Strategy
plugins.description: Vision, business models, pricing, competitive landscape, and 0-to-1 product foundation.

plugins.name: PM Market Research
plugins.description: Personas, segmentation, journey maps, market sizing, competitor analysis, and competitive intelligence.

plugins.name: PM Data Analytics
plugins.description: Funnels, cohorts, growth accounting, feature adoption, unit economics, A/B tests, SQL, and full product health diagnostics.

plugins.name: PM Go-to-Market
plugins.description: Beachhead segments, ICPs, messaging, growth loops, GTM motions, battlecards, and competitive intelligence.

plugins.name: PM Marketing and Growth
plugins.description: Marketing ideas, positioning, value propositions, naming, and North Star metrics.

plugins.name: PM Toolkit
plugins.description: PM utilities: resume review, legal documents, and grammar checking.
